title: MISA Handoff
description: MISA Handoff v1 contract. MISA receives only valid operational checkpoints with mapping, sync status, reconcile status, audit, evidence, and idempotency.
$comment: Sources: PACK-04 and Operational Forms FRM-25. TODO: exact MISA target module and payload fields are not finalized.

checkpoint_type.description: Checkpoint type such as material issue confirmed or warehouse receipt confirmed. TODO: define official checkpoint type enum.

source_form_id.description: Source operational form, usually FRM-25 created from a valid checkpoint.

mapping_status.description: MISA mapping status, including PENDING_MAPPING, MAPPED, MISA_MAPPING_MISSING when applicable.

sync_status.description: Sync status such as NOT_SYNCED, PENDING, SUCCESS, ERROR, or SYNC_BLOCKED.

reconcile_status.description: Reconcile status such as PENDING, MATCHED, or EXCEPTION.

accounting_object_type.description: Accounting object type. TODO: define official values.

error_reason.description: Error reason when sync or reconcile fails.
